info.name: Rimekin
info.description: The Rimekin species from Lorwyn: First Light.
info.author: Wizards of the Coast

description.p: Rimekin hail from both Lorwyn and Shadowmoor, though the first rimekin arose from flamekin during the Phyrexian invasion. These flamekin approached their problems with cold logic and rejected reactionary responses. As a result, the magical flames that engulfed their bodies took on a frigid air, and they became rimekin.

Like flamekin, rimekin possess innate magic, but the flames they conjure burn icy blue rather than red hot. Further, these "flames" emanate a chilling cold rather than blazing heat. This effect extends, superficially, to the items rimekin touch. Any armor worn or weapons wielded by rimekin become coated in layers of spiky yet harmless hoarfrost.

ul.li: Size: Medium (about 4–7 feet tall) or Small (about 2–4 feet tall), chosen when you select this species

description.p: As a Rimekin, you have these special traits.
Darkvision. You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.
Cold Resistance. You have Resistance to Cold damage.

Cold Fire Magic. You know the Ray of Frost cantrip. When you reach character levels 3 and 5, you learn the Ice Knife spell and the Flame Blade spell, respectively. You always have those spells prepared. You can cast each once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast these spells in this way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast the spells using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level. When you cast Flame Blade using this trait, the spell deals Cold damage instead of Fire damage.
Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells when you cast them with this trait (choose when you select this race).

You know the Ray of Frost cantrip. When you reach character levels 3 and 5, you learn the Ice Knife spell and the Flame Blade spell, respectively. You always have those spells prepared. You can cast each once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast these spells in this way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast the spells using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level. When you cast Flame Blade using this trait, the spell deals Cold damage instead of Fire damage.
Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells when you cast them with this trait (choose when you select this race).
Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait.

sheet.description: You know the Ray of Frost cantrip. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for it.

You know the Ray of Frost cantrip. You can cast the Ice Knife spell once per Long Rest. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait. You can also cast this spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.

You know the Ray of Frost cantrip. You can cast the Ice Knife and Flame Blade spells once each per Long Rest. When you cast Flame Blade using this trait, it deals Cold damage instead of Fire damage. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait. You can also cast these spells using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.

description.p: Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait.

sheet.description: You know the Ray of Frost cantrip. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for it.

You know the Ray of Frost cantrip. You can cast the Ice Knife spell once per Long Rest. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait. You can also cast this spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.

You know the Ray of Frost cantrip. You can cast the Ice Knife and Flame Blade spells once each per Long Rest. When you cast Flame Blade using this trait, it deals Cold damage instead of Fire damage. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait. You can also cast these spells using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.

description.p: Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait.

sheet.description: You know the Ray of Frost cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.

You know the Ray of Frost cantrip. You can cast the Ice Knife spell once per Long Rest. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait. You can also cast this spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.

You know the Ray of Frost cantrip. You can cast the Ice Knife and Flame Blade spells once each per Long Rest. When you cast Flame Blade using this trait, it deals Cold damage instead of Fire damage. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait. You can also cast these spells using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.
